data.text: The repository already has a `work/guard.go`, so I’m checking whether the bead is asking for a completion/cleanup pass or if there are still direct map references left in the loop. I also need to confirm the current `nextCandidate` shape and the existing pre-claim tests so I can preserve behavior while removing the ad-hoc state.

I’ve confirmed the `work` package already contains the new guard abstractions and unit tests, so the remaining work is likely in the loop wiring and any leftover map-based skip state. Next I’m checking for any stale references and the exact pre-claim behavior so I can remove only the obsolete pieces.

data.text: I’ve narrowed this to a single code path change: `nextCandidate` still rebuilds an `attempted` map from the drain results slice. I’m removing that extra state and switching the filter to a direct scan over `drain.result.Results`, which should satisfy the bead without changing the public shape of the loop.

The patch is small and the diff looks clean. I’m waiting on the package test run now; if that comes back green, I’ll go straight to the repo’s pre-commit hook and then stop.
The test command is still running, so I’m just letting it finish rather than interrupting the package sweep. Once it returns, I’ll know whether the refactor changed picker behavior anywhere else.

data.text: The commit is in place. I’m doing a final status check to confirm the worktree is clean and there aren’t any stray edits before I hand back the result.

Implemented the picker refactor in [cli/internal/agent/execute_bead_loop.go](/tmp/ddx-exec-wt/.execute-bead-wt-ddx-06eb05d8-20260506T071449-9630c7fb/cli/internal/agent/execute_bead_loop.go#L1317).

What changed:
- `nextCandidate` now filters against the current drain results slice directly instead of rebuilding an `attempted` map.
- Removed the local `attempted` allocation and added a small `hasResultForBead` helper.
- Kept the existing guard wiring intact; the loop still passes `work.Guard` instances into `nextCandidate`.

- `cd cli && go test ./internal/agent/... ./internal/agent/work/...`
